title: Be Forever Yamato: Rebel 3199: Part 2: Red Sun Sortie
original_title: ヤマトよ永遠に REBEL3199 第二章 赤日の出撃
overview: Second film in the theatrical version of Be Forever Yamato: Rebel 3199, covering chapters 3–6. In 2209, a mysterious "Grand Reverse" invades Earth's capital, defying defenses. The former Yamato crew reunites on a secret order, embarking on a perilous journey as an unknown invader threatens humanity's fate.

trailers.title: 特報2
trailers.channel_name: バンダイナムコフィルムワークス チャンネル
